title: Portable fuel metering system
abstract: A portable fuel metering system (PMU) is described. The PMU has one or more flow meters capable of metering the flow of fluids, such as fuel, as the fluid is transferred from a source to a receiver. The PMU may include a telemetry unit configured to transmit parameters related to the fuel transfer to remote location. The PMU may be configured in a light, portable package that may be carried by one or two people. The PMU may include a power generator that is configured to use the flow of fluid to the PMU to generate power for the PMU's operation.
claims: 1. A system for monitoring a transfer of fuel between a fuel store and a fuel receiver, the system comprising: a portable metering unit (PMU) configurable between the fuel store and the fuel receiver so that fuel flows through the PMU during the transfer, wherein the PMU comprises: a flow meter comprising one or more sensors configured to measure one or more parameters of the fuel as it a flows between the fuel source and the fuel receiver, wherein the one or more parameters comprises flow rate, a data port configured to receive fuel store data from one or more fuel store sensors configured at the fuel store, a telemetry unit configured to telemeter data indicative of the one or more parameters and the fuel store data to a remote location, and a power generation unit comprising a generator configured to generate power for the flow meter and the telemetry unit by converting energy of fuel flowing through the power generation unit into electrical energy and providing the electrical energy to a bus, whereby the electrical energy is provided to the flow meter and the telemetry unit.
